mapper.select: SELECT i.id, p.name AS project_name, i.invite_time, su.name AS inviter_name, i.status, i.response_time, i.notes FROM invitations AS i LEFT JOIN sys_user AS su ON i.inviter_id=su.user_id LEFT JOIN projects AS p ON i.project_id=p.id where expert_id=#{expertId}
mapper.delete:
delete from invitations where expert_id in
#{expertId}
mapper.select:
SELECT i.id, e.name AS expert_name, p.name AS project_name, i.`invite_time`, i.`status`, i.`response_time`, i.`notes` FROM invitations AS i LEFT JOIN experts AS e ON i.`expert_id`=e.`id` LEFT JOIN projects AS p ON i.project_id=p.id
and i.project_id=#{projectId} and i.status=#{status} and i.created_time <= #{startDate} and i.created >=#{endDate}
